input.instructions: Search for theoretical physics literature, specifically papers discussing 'Black Hole Classicality Constants' and the 'classicality of single-photon Hawking radiation'. Identify the three specific universal dimensionless constants that govern this phenomenon and provide their exact numerical values. Focus on works related to quantum effects in Hawking radiation.

orchestration.decision_notes: The previous child nodes have only provided summaries of their intent to search. I need to actually perform the search to find the specific constants and their values.
